posts.text: If you have to say it...

The merger of two of Hollywood’s biggest studios will have widespread impacts on California and the entire American entertainment industry. 

For the sake of our jobs, small businesses, and our independent news media, we must thoroughly explore these impacts.

Video

More than 2,000 Marines from Camp Pendleton are now headed to the Middle East as the Iran War shows no signs of slowing.

Alarm bells should be ringing across America, with the prospect of boots on the ground. 

Every day raises the risks of a new forever war.
wsj.com/livecoverage/iran-us…

LIVE: Tune in as I hold a spotlight hearing to examine how the proposed Warner Bros./Paramount deal would impact workers as we seek to strengthen film and tv production in California and the United States.

We must fight to keep movie magic here at home.

piped.video/live/Ubgsm_HV3O8…

If you’re wondering why Trump doesn’t care about our economy or bringing down costs - it’s because his personal economy is doing great. He’s making tons of money and so are the billionaires around him.

Let’s break down some ties between Trump officials and the money they’ve made while in office.

Video
wsj.com/world/russia-is-shar…

The same Russian regime that we're giving hundreds of millions dollars a day in sanctions relief is again reportedly helping Iran find and kill even more American servicemembers.

And while Vladimir Putin gets richer, you pay more at the pump.

Eid Mubarak to all those celebrating across California and the country! 

Wishing everyone a joyful and blessed holiday.

Tulsi Gabbard says she did “not” participate in domestic law enforcement activities when she was on the scene of an FBI operation to seize ballots in Fulton County

So why was she there? Watch her struggle to explain:

Video

Senate Republicans refuse to hold open hearings on the Iran War and its mounting costs.

Tonight, I joined my Democratic colleagues in forcing that transparency. 

We will continue to demand answers from the administration, and an end to the war.

TSA agents could've gotten their paychecks for the first time in a month starting TODAY.

But Senate Republicans blocked our effort.

Your wait times at the airport and TSA employees missing meals are a cost they are willing to pay. It isn’t right.


Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock (@SenatorWarnock)

Senate Republicans just blocked my bill that would have paid TSA workers.

My Republican colleagues are saying that if you don't give the President's overgrown paramilitary force of masked agents m

The economy is not working for millions of Americans. Trump's Presidency has made the problem so much worse. 

Don't just take my word for it. Take it from Linda:

Video

I commend the courage of these women for coming forward and sharing their agonizing stories of exploitation, sexual assault, and lifelong trauma.

This is a heartbreaking revelation, and my thoughts are with all survivors who will feel the terrible weight of this new reporting. 

The legacy of UFW promoting equitable and fair treatment for our farm workers is not the province of any one person, including Cesar Chavez. 

The work that the organizers and leaders of UFW continue to do today is abso

Senate Republicans and Trump want to make it harder for you to vote.

We're pushing back. 

Tune in as I hold the Senate floor to BLOCK the SAVE Act and protect our most sacred constitutional right. The right to vote.

Watch:  nitter.net/i/broadcasts/1nxeLybrY…

Rather than saving America from being dragged into a forever war, Senate Republicans would rather focus on their so-called SAVE America Act.

Here's how dangerous this voter suppression bill would be for your right to vote:

Video

From Southern California to the Bay Area to the Sierra Nevada mountains, California's natural beauty never ceases to amaze me. 

Check out the beautiful superblooms happening across the Golden state this spring.

The true financial cost of the Iran War is hard to quantify, but the billions we’ve already spent could’ve been used on hospitals and health care, or lowering other costs for Americans. 

Not to mention the increased price at the pump.
